item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 3min Brilliant first Judgement Day with three Crucible debuts secured for exciting young talent
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 3min Brilliant first Judgement Day with three Crucible debuts secured for exciting young talents.
Superb effort from an ill Stan Moody, Liam Pullen coming from the opening round and Antoni Kowalski with his tour card on the line.
More here De metro.co.uk 100

item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 7min PURE CLASS!
Stan Moody. While Suffering With Tonsillitis. In a Decider. To Make The Crucible. F
item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 7min PURE CLASS!
Stan Moody. While Suffering With Tonsillitis. In a Decider. To Make The Crucible. For The First Time. Aged 19!
#JudgementDay 1 3 30 2 mil

item.title:
Livesnooker: Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 7min 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗡'𝗦 𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗠𝗔𝗡 𝗜𝗡 𝗦𝗛𝗘𝗙𝗙𝗜𝗘𝗟𝗗
19-year-old Stan Moody will make his debut at The Crucibl
item.description:
Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 7min 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗡'𝗦 𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗠𝗔𝗡 𝗜𝗡 𝗦𝗛𝗘𝗙𝗙𝗜𝗘𝗟𝗗
19-year-old Stan Moody will make his debut at The Crucible following a nail-biting 10-9 success over Jiang Jun in the final qualifying round, making a 104 break in the decider Hecho con IA 5 403
